---

## Project

Name: JobDash Design System v1.0
Product: JobDash — a job-application tracking web product
Stack: React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + CSS custom properties (design tokens)
Repo: ~/Documents/workspace/design-system

---

## Scope

53 sections across 10 groups: Foundation, Layout, Inputs, Surfaces, Data Display,
Feedback, Navigation, Patterns, Interaction, Sample Screens. Full light and dark
mode. Web-first, responsive. Companion mobile views, email templates, and status
pages are design references — not React component library deliverables (status
pages excepted: now spec'd for Phase 27).

---

## Goals

1. Port all design tokens as CSS custom properties (:root + body.dark).
2. Build every missing component to pixel-precise spec.
3. Achieve WCAG 2.2 AAA on all body text; AA-or-better on all UI elements.
4. Pass axe-core scan with zero violations on every component.
5. Pass Sample Screens integration test in both light and dark mode.

---

in this ingest's PRD source include the foundation components listed in the
README build order: Button, Input, Select, Checkbox, Toggle, Badge, Chip, Card,

  Phase 19: RelativeTime         — formatted relative timestamp with hover tooltip
  Phase 20: StatCard             — composition: label + value + trend badge + Sparkline

  Phase 22: CommandPalette       — Cmd+K modal search with grouped results
  Phase 23: Pagination           — full variant + compact variant
  Phase 22: Kbd                  — keyboard shortcut display element

NEW IN THIS INGEST (2026-05-05) — now spec'd, ready to plan:

---

## Design Token System

All tokens are CSS custom properties. Light mode on :root; dark mode on body.dark.
No JS recompute on theme switch — pure CSS cascade.

Color system: cream/ink/amber palette (see constraints.md CONSTRAINT-001 for
all exact values). Vivid variants for charts/badges (static across modes).

Typography: Archivo (display), Inter (body), JetBrains Mono (mono/labels).

Spacing: 12-step scale, 4px increments (--space-1 through --space-16).
Radius: 5 stops — 4 / 8 / 12 / 16 / 999px.
Shadow: 3 stops — subtle / card / floating (plus deep dialog shadow).
Motion: 4 durations (120/180/240/360ms) × 3 easings + spring. All respect
  prefers-reduced-motion (cap at 200ms or instant).
Focus: amber ring, box-shadow only (no outline suppression without replacement).

---

## Key Implementation Constraints

- React + TypeScript. No other framework.
- Theming: body.dark class toggle + CSS custom property cascade.
- Always-dark surfaces (ServerErrorPage 500, code blocks, dark cards): hardcoded
  #1c1917 / #f5f3f0 — never token references. (See DECISION-004, CONSTRAINT-020.)
- Icons: 1.5px stroke, 24x24, stroke="currentColor". Lucide/Heroicons/Phosphor
  acceptable substitute at matching line-weight.
- No raster images in component library. SVG or CSS only. PlaceholderImg uses
  CSS-only diagonal stripe pattern.
- ds-* CSS class name protocol must be followed (CONSTRAINT-007 + new additions
  CONSTRAINT-015 / CONSTRAINT-016 / CONSTRAINT-017).
- axe-core zero-violation gate applies to every component.
- DataGrid depends on Badge, Checkbox, Table, Button, PageButton being present first.
- StatusPage parameterization is per-component-plan scope (CONSTRAINT-021); the
  ingest establishes which props need overrides, not their exact signatures.
- FileUploadZone validation behavior is unlocked (CONSTRAINT-019) — Phase 26
  component plan must pin behavior before build.
